p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](a, identity_fn(x))
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](b, identity_fn(x))
function[T0, T1: lib(mul).Mul](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> T1) { x0(x1) * x2(x1) = pointwise_mul[T0, T1](x0, x2, x1) }[Real, Real](constant[Real, Real](a), x, identity_fn[Real])
function(x0: Real) { pointwise_add(pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant[Real, Real](a), identity_fn[Real]), constant[Real, Real](b), x0) = p(x0) }(x)

function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[Real, Real](pointwise_mul[Real, Real](constant[Real, Real](a), identity_fn[Real]), constant[Real, Real](b), x)

goal: affine_real(a, b, x) = a * x + b

p.c: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 = affine_real(x0, x2, x1) }(a, x, b)
function(x1: Real -> Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, a) = derivative_pred(x1) }(p)
function(x1: Real -> Real) { differentiable_at(x1, x0) = differentiable_pred(x1) }(p)

goal: has_derivative_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](p, f), x0, a * d)
compose[Real, Real, Real](affine_real(a, b), f) = compose[Real, Real, Real](p, f)

p.c: function(x1: Real -> Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, a * d) = derivative_pred(x1) }(compose[Real, Real, Real](p, f))

goal: has_derivative_at(compose[Real, Real, Real](affine_real(a, b), f), x0, a * d)
compose[Real, Real, Real](affine_real(a, b), f) = compose[Real, Real, Real](p, f)

p.c: function(x1: Real -> Real) { differentiable_at(x1, x0) = differentiable_pred(x1) }(compose[Real, Real, Real](p, f))
